# autoSDD Learning Log

> **INDEX** — each entry points to consolidated learnings in Engram. Content lives there, not here.
> Updated by `/improve` after user approval. Entries appended chronologically (newest at bottom).

**How it works**: Observations (per-step, per-session) → `/improve` consolidates by theme → learnings saved to Engram (`learnings/{project}/{category}/{id}`) → entry added here → observations marked `applied`.

## 2026-04-26 — ProHuella v2.6.2-v2.6.7 /improve analysis

**Source**: Session `824259de` (ProHuella) + session `9199e0ba` (dogfooding /improve) · **Observations consumed**: 5 (#228-#232) · **Sections affected**: .claude/settings.json (hooks), templates/CLAUDE.md

### Learnings Created
| Category | Engram Key | Severity | Summary |
|----------|-----------|----------|---------|
| architecture | `learnings/autosdd/architecture/hook-scope` | HIGH | Hooks with matcher:"*" descarril non-pipeline sub-agents; need scope + anti-recursion |
| delegation | `learnings/autosdd/delegation/template-compliance` | HIGH | Sub-agent template compliance is 0% without pre-launch enforcement gate |
| anti-patterns | `learnings/autosdd/anti-patterns/autonomy-skip` | HIGH | "Full autonomy" ≠ skip meta-pipeline; feedback.md and observations are non-negotiable |

### Changes Applied
- Rewrote SubagentStop hook: ORCHESTRATOR-ONLY framing, no imperative "ask NOW", awareness check instead of directive
- Rewrote Stop hook: anti-recursion guard, decision-point awareness, non-blocking
- Updated templates/CLAUDE.md hooks section to reflect v2 semantics
